description:
In this video, we will explain all features, waiting periods, discount, add-ons (like infinite claim, power booster, Jump Start, Inflation protector, Air ambulance, room modifier, maternity benefit, health check up benefit, OPD treatment benefit, tele consultation benefit, critical illness rider, personal accident rider benefit, etc.) in the ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

00:00 - Introduction
01:08 -Top Features in ICICI Lombard Elevate
02:25 - Features of ICICI Lombard Elevate
03:14 - Bonus, Refill Benefit in ICICI Lombard Elevate
04:05 - Ambulance Benefits in ICICI Lombard Elevate
04:33 - Add-ons in ICICI Lombard Elevate
09:06 - Waiting Periods in Lombard Elevate
09:37 - Discounts in ICICI Lombard Elevate
10:12 - Premiums for ICICI Lombard Elevate
